import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("invalid input")
  end
  mut i = n
  while i >= 0
    println("#{i}")
    i = i - 1
  end
  println("done")
  Ok(())
end
